title: Angular Velocity Range in Kerr Ergosphere
desc: Derives allowed angular velocity range for observers inside ergosphere, approaching horizon.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 9: Pauli Matrices
desc: Proofs of Pauli matrix identities and spin operators.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 10: Electron Gas
desc: Calculates Fermi energy, internal energy, and degeneracy pressure for free electron gas at 0K.

title: 干涉仪噪声组成与量子噪声分析
desc: 分析干涉仪噪声源，包括量子、热、悬挂、重力梯度及残余气体噪声。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 8: Angular Momentum
desc: Proves commutator identities for vector operators and angular momentum.

title: Debye Model: Partition Function, Energy, Entropy
desc: Derives ln Z, internal energy, and entropy for solids using Debye spectrum in high and low T limits.

title: Photon Field Energy-Momentum Tensor
desc: Derivation of gauge invariant, traceless energy-momentum tensor for photon field.

title: Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Proof of Lorentz invariance for momentum inner product and optical theorem from S-matrix unitarity.

title: Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitude with source and on-shell factorization theorem steps.

title: Spinor Helicity for Null Momentum
desc: Derives spinor expressions for null momentum with negative energy and shows transformation under LGTs.

title: Vanishing All-Plus Gluon Amplitude
desc: Tree-level all-plus 4-gluon amplitude vanishes; u-channel factorization for + + - - case.

title: Non-Relativistic QFT and Leading Order Effects
desc: Analyzes NR limit of charged scalar scattering, including Coulomb and relativistic corrections.

title: Massless Amplitudes and Spinor Helicity
desc: Lecture on massless amplitudes using spinor helicity formalism and Lorentz group decomposition.

title: BEC in 2D and 3D Harmonic Trap
desc: Proves no BEC in 2D ideal Bose gas; derives BEC critical temperature in 3D harmonic trap.

title: QFT: Renormalization and Photon Field
desc: Quantum field theory basics: Hamiltonian, Lagrangian, renormalization, and photon field quantization.

title: 量子力学中心力场作业分析
desc: 二体系统动能算符分解及球方势阱束缚态条件推导。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 7
desc: Seventh assignment covering key quantum mechanics concepts.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: Introduction to Feynman diagrams with exercises, covering Dirac equation and QED cross-section calculation.

title: Phase Transition Thermodynamics: Latent Heat and Internal Energy
desc: Derives molar internal energy change and latent heat variation with temperature in phase transitions.

title: 统计力学第6次作业：二维气体速度分布
desc: 推导二维理想气体速度分布，求平均、最概然和方均根速率，及相对速率分布。

title: Lecture 6: Chasse_neige and Four Particle Test
desc: Analyzing four-particle amplitudes using on-shell factorization and tree-level approximation.

title: Gravitational Waves: Linear Approximation
desc: Derivation of linearized Einstein equations for gravitational wave perturbations.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 7 Solutions
desc: Entropy of Einstein solid and magnetization of crystal with spin-1 atoms.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 3: Step Potential
desc: Reflection and transmission coefficients for a step potential, verifying R+T=1.

title: 量子力学对称性与守恒量作业分析
desc: 证明自由粒子角动量守恒及Feynman-Hellmann定理。

title: On-Shell Factorization in QFT
desc: Analyzing Green functions and poles in scalar particle scattering.

title: Killing Vectors of Schwarzschild Metric
desc: Proving δ^μ_t and δ^μ_φ are Killing vectors in Schwarzschild spacetime.

title: General Relativity Homework 5 Analysis
desc: Calculates connection and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 4: Operator Properties
desc: Proves inverse adjoint relation and Hermiticity condition for similarity transformation.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 5: Particle Distributions
desc: Derives most probable distributions for classical, Bose, and Fermi particles, identifying β as temperature parameter.
